test_cases.description: EQUALS comparison returns true when equal
test_cases.law_yaml:
$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: EQUALS
                    subject: 10
                    value: 10
                  then: "equal"
              default: "not_equal"

test_cases.description: EQUALS comparison returns false when not equal
test_cases.law_yaml:
$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: EQUALS
                    subject: 10
                    value: 20
                  then: "equal"
              default: "not_equal"

$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: NOT_EQUALS
                    subject: 10
                    value: 20
                  then: "not_equal"
              default: "equal"

$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: GREATER_THAN
                    subject: 20
                    value: 10
                  then: "greater"
              default: "not_greater"

$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: LESS_THAN
                    subject: 10
                    value: 20
                  then: "less"
              default: "not_less"

$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL
                    subject: 10
                    value: 10
                  then: "gte"
              default: "not_gte"

$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: LESS_THAN_OR_EQUAL
                    subject: 10
                    value: 10
                  then: "lte"
              default: "not_lte"

$schema: https://example.com/schema/v0.5.0/schema.json
$id: test_comparison
regulatory_layer: WET
publication_date: '2025-01-01'
articles:
  - number: '1'
    text: Test article
    machine_readable:

      definitions:
        THRESHOLD: 18
      execution:
        output:
          - name: result
            type: string
        actions:
          - output: result
            value:
              operation: IF
              cases:
                - when:
                    operation: GREATER_THAN
                    subject: $THRESHOLD
                    value: 15
                  then: "above"
              default: "below"
